name: Eskimo Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the sugar and cocoa powder until well combined.
2. Add butter, water, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add rolled oats, stirring continuously until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Refrigerate the dough for at least 8 hours or overnight.
5. Remove from refrigerator and roll into small balls (about 1 inch in diameter).
6. Roll each ball in powdered sugar to coat evenly.
Refrigerate any leftover dough in an airtight container for up to one week.
